title: Possible further leads to Adams identity

wikitext:
[]: Possible further leads to Adams identity             Quote Post by phd_in_deceit » Wed Nov 18, 2020 3:53 pm Just noticed something people may have skipped, that is in the sole picture we have of Adams SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Possible further leads to Adams identity             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Nov 19, 2020 7:34 am The notion that 01 is one of the Adams would be correct! There is a whole thread that also touches on the identity of the Adams in quite some depth; the stuff about atoms isn't in it, but it is a nice additional layer to the whole
